title: Autocorrelated Sampling in Cognition
text:

NoteRequirements



Before the workshop, please install the R programming language in your machine. An IDE, such as RStudio will be useful but not necessary.
Please install the samplr package in R, which you can do by running:
install.packages("samplr")
